title: Beyblade G Revolution
titleNative: 爆転シュート　ベイブレードＧレボリューション
synopsis: After keeping their BitBeasts out of harm's way, a new world championship tournament is announced, but the defending champions can't all be on the same team. Their friendship will be tested and tried as each Bladebreaker goes on a quest to prove why they are the best Beyblader around. Tyson, Max, Ray, Kai, and newcomer Daichi, must keep up their winning ways...even if they must face each other. But, after the tournament is over, what awaits them is an old foe, Boris, taking over the BBA and transforming it into BEGA, the Beyblade Entertainment Global Association. To save Beybladers of the entire world from BEGA's corruption, the Bladebreakers must reunite once again... (Source: Anime News Network)

synopsis: One day, a group of aliens planing to take over the Earth invade Tokyo. Momoko, who aspires to be an idol, gets involved in the fight in an unexpected form. title: Gun God
synopsis: With the arrival of mysterious super-era technology, Gene Lock promotes unprecedented strengthening of human body functions such as speed, power and senses. Those who successfully open the genetic lock are able to become "agents", with the best among the agents being the "gun gods". Around the new armament of gene lock, various forces fiercely struggled to establish academies to cultivate agents. With the breakthrough and application of experiments, and the coercion from the mysterious race, the world has gradually fallen into the quagmire of war. After the war, the mysterious race disappeared, and the agents and spears became unproven urban legends. The only remaining two special agent organizations, "Deep Sea" and "Dead Snake", moved their bases to the seabed and underground, respectively, without disturbing each other. However, under a peaceful scene, it is actually in crisis. The dark tide is still tumbling, and the great wheel of history has never stopped spinning. The story begin

title: RE:cycle of the PENGUINDRUM Part 1: Your Train Is the Survival Tactic
titleRomaji: RE:cycle of the PENGUINDRUM: Zenpen - Kimi no Ressha wa Seizon Senryaku
titleEnglish: RE:cycle of the PENGUINDRUM Part 1: Your Train Is the Survival Tactic
titleNative: RE:cycle of the PENGUINDRUM ［前編］ 君の列車は生存戦略
synonyms: 劇場版 RE:cycle of the PENGUINDRUM
synopsis: The first film in a duology compiling the Mawaru Penguindrum anime with new elements. What would you do to save someone you love? All brothers Shoma and Kanba know is that, after collapsing in an aquarium and apparently dying, their terminally ill sister Himari was somehow revived by a Penguin hat that she had wished for. Now they're on an impossible mission, because the price of keeping Himari alive is to find a mysterious object called the Penguindrum, and they'll do anything to save their sister. Anything. As they travel separate paths in their search, they'll have to unravel complex riddles, make alliances with strangers they know they shouldn't trust, and question the very fabrics of time and destiny. (Source: Sentai Filmworks)

title: Gui Chui Deng: Nan Hai Gui Xu
titleRomaji: Gui Chui Deng: Nan Hai Gui Xu
synonyms: Candle in the Tomb: South Sea Tomb
synopsis: Hu Bayi and his companions, commissioned by Professor Chen, travel to Coral Temple Island in the South China Sea and hire Ruan Hei and his apprentice to embark on the Trident to search for the Qin Emperor's Bone Mirror. After their adventure, they crash into Guixu, where they discover the ancient mirror within the shipwreck and learn that Ruan Hei is Duoling's enemy. While resting after their escape, a mysterious figure suddenly appears, wielding a club, approaching Uncle Ming, who is on night watch. (Source: Tencent, translated)

tags.name: Full CGI
tags.description: Almost entirely created with computer-generated imagery.

title: Sword and Fairy 4
synopsis: For the sake of their cultivation endeavors, the Qionghua Sect sent its elders to forge two swords, Wangshu and Xihe, and sought two disciples to wield them in dual cultivation, attempting to bind the demon realm and seize its immense spiritual power. This ultimately triggered a great war between humans and demons, resulting in heavy casualties on both sides. During this time, Su Yu, the host of Wangshu, disagreed with the Qionghua Sect's cultivation philosophy and left the sect with Yun Tianqing. The demon realm seized the opportunity to escape, and the Qionghua Sect's leader perished in the war. The two married on Qingluan Peak and had a son, Yun Tianhe. They both died young due to the icy cold that invaded their bodies. Young Yun Tianhe grew up alone on Qingluan Mountain. He was unaware of his parents' past, and the unexpected arrival of Han Lingsha set the wheels of fate turning once more. (Source: Bilibili, translated)

synonyms: Break Blade 1: The Time of Awakening
synopsis: In the continent of Cruzon, an impending war between the Kingdom of Krisna and the nation of Athens is brimming. The people of this land are able to use quartz for whatever purpose they desire. Yet one person, Rygart Arrow, is not. He is an "un-sorcerer," a person unable to use quartz. But this characteristic will enable him to pilot an ancient Golem, one strong enough to put up a fight against the invading army of Athens.

title: Cai Mogu
synopsis: Two little rabbits one with long ear and the other with a short tail are good friends. One day, they found a big mushroom in the woods and started a fight for this mushroom. The two good friends quarreled. It suddenly rained heavily in a thunderstorm, and short tail was washed down a waterfall to the bottom of a ravine. Long ear tried to find short tail and finally rescued him from the moat. In the end both are good friends again.
